channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Git GPU latency wars spark: GH200 hits single-digit microseconds in STAC-ML, shaking FPGA bets. 4.61μs @ 99th percentile, multi-instance stability. 🟢 Open source dl-lowl... https://Blockchain.News/news/nvidia-gh200-microsecond-latency-trading-benchmark #AI #Trading #GPUs

item.title: Gemma 4 goes local: NVIDIA now supports Google’s multimodal models across Blackwell, Jetson, and RTX for on‑prem deployment. 🔒🤖 https://Blockchain.News/news/nvidia-optimizes-google-gemma-4-edge-ai-deployment #AI #EdgeAI #Gemma4

item.title: IOTA powers real-world trade—Starfish on testnet, Kenya to UK live links. 🛰️ Trade docs stay at source as TWIN connects KenTrade, KRA, and TLIP across ports. https://Blockchain.News/news/iota-starfish-consensus-twin-trade-network-kenya-uk-q1-2026 #IOTA #TradeTech #DLT
